arts.ttl: Rejuvenated Hull City suffer double blow ahead of crucial West Brom trip
arts.sum: The trip to the Black Country sees City play their fourth game in two weeks, and managers often say the third game is often the most challenging for players' fitness levels, something Selles is especially aware of given the herculean effort at Ashton Gate last Saturday which saw the Tigers play for almost 90 minutes with 10 men after Joao Pedro's early red card . Drameh picked up a knock on his knee in training and missed Wednesday night's 2-1 win over Oxford United meaning the defender is expected to be sidelined for the next couple of weeks.
